commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=67627ffeab7b6bafaabe40c5b18c8b1a2b3a6481)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Feishu runtime guard and a mocked test that skip DM and broadcast dispatch when `core.channel.inbound.run` is missing.

PR surface: Source +38, Tests +36. Total +74 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. Source inspection and the mocked PR test show the failure mode once `core.channel.inbound.run` is absent, but there is no live Feishu gateway proof of how current main reaches that incomplete runtime.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is delivery-preserving runtime-binding repair plus live Feishu proof, which needs maintainer review rather than an automated repair marker.

target.title: fix(feishu): add defensive check for channel runtime initialization #87646
target.body:
## Description

Fixes #87646

The feishu channel dispatch fails with `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading run)` after upgrading to v2026.5.27.

### Root Cause

The error occurs in `extensions/feishu/src/bot.ts` when calling `core.channel.inbound.run()`. The `core.channel.inbound` is `undefined`, indicating the channel runtime may not be fully initialized at the time of dispatch.

### Changes

- Add defensive check before calling `core.channel.inbound.run()`
- Provide detailed error message including:
  - Expected vs actual type of `core.channel.inbound.run`
  - Channel runtime keys for debugging
  - Clear indication of possible plugin loading order issue

This fix improves error reporting and helps identify the root cause of the initialization issue, making it easier to debug similar problems in the future.

### Testing

- Verified the defensive check catches uninitialized state
- Error message provides actionable debugging information
- No breaking changes to existing functionality
